intro: AI is reshaping enterprise software markets as vendors compete to retain customers amid rapid technology shifts, with established players facing pressure to adapt their strategies. Trump signaled reduced concerns about Anthropic as a national security threat following a G7 meeting with the company's CEO, potentially easing restrictions on its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models. John Jumper, the Nobel Prize-winning researcher from Google DeepMind, is joining Anthropic, intensifying the talent competition among major AI labs.

whitelist.title: As AI Drives A New Wave Of Vendor Replacement, Incumbents Need A Better Strategy To Survive
whitelist.desc: Artificial intelligence is creating a subtle but important shift in enterprise technology and services markets.

whitelist.title: Trump says he no longer views Anthropic as a national security threat after G7 meeting with CEO
whitelist.desc: Trump told Axios that Anthropic has "behaved very responsibly" and signalled he may ease restrictions on its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models.

whitelist.desc: Norway will reportedly ban young kids from using AI in schools.

whitelist.title: Google’s Nobel Prize-winning AI researcher is joining Anthropic.
whitelist.desc: John Jumper, who has worked as a researcher at Google DeepMind since 2017, announced his departure from the company on X. whitelist.title: Aether AI raises $20mn to build causal world models
